headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — use today to drive the 'Generated Evaluations: No Ground Truth' design doc forward before the next bi-weekly review cycle.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credential issues so dashboards are live for the work week
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (auth failures); you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or substantially advance the design doc for AE-1079 (Generated evaluations — no ground truth)
must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket, no due date set which means it could slip silently; evals is a key 26.4 deliverable per OKRs and ties directly to the Agents big rock

must_make_progress.task: Review latest Agents bi-weekly TR Confluence page and align your evals work to the key 26.4+ deliverables list
must_make_progress.why: Ensures your design doc addresses what leadership expects; evals was explicitly called out in the TR agenda

must_communicate_with.about: Align on technical approach for generated evaluations without ground truth — get early input before design doc review
Coordinate on evals patterns (DeepRAG, BatchTransform) and how no-ground-truth evals fit into the templates + patterns workstream

must_report_status.topic: AE-1079 design doc progress and target completion date
must_report_status.note: Ticket has no due date — set one proactively and communicate it before next bi-weekly TR

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Fix credentials ASAP.
Snowflake metrics connection is broken (empty password) — product telemetry and MBR dashboard data are inaccessible.
AE-1079 has no due date set — risk of silent slippage on a key evals deliverable.
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in the OKR page — monitor for spillover impact on your evals workstream.

outcomes.business_impact: No escalations resolved or decisions made yet today — primary opportunity is unblocking observability by fixing Salesforce/Snowflake credentials and advancing the no-ground-truth evals design which underpins the 26.4 Agents deliverable.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are currently unavailable due to broken Snowflake connection; advancing the AE-1079 design doc is the highest-leverage adoption-driving work today as it enables evaluation without ground truth — a key gap for broader agent adoption.

slack_summary: Quiet Monday: no meetings, no emails, no Slack activity — ideal deep-work day. Top priority: make real progress on the Generated Evaluations (no ground truth) design doc (AE-1079) before the next Agents bi-weekly review. Second priority: fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you regain visibility on escalations and product metrics. Zero meetings today.
